cards.front: What are the top concerns for cloud users?
cards.back: Data privacy, security breaches, compliance with regulations, and data loss
Data stored in the cloud, accessible from anywhere, accessible from any device with an internet connection

cards.front: What is Data Loss Prevention (DLP) in Cloud Computing
cards.back: Technique used to prevent data from being accidentally or maliciously leaked from the cloud to unauthorized parties

cards.front: What is Compliance in Cloud Computing?
cards.back: Refers to the adherence to laws, regulations, and industry standards governing data protection and security in cloud computing
Protecting data in the cloud from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification, or destruction
